name: ops
description: Business operations command center for Claude Code. Manage communications, projects, infrastructure, and revenue from your terminal. Includes YOLO mode for autonomous business operation.

telegram_api_id.title: Telegram API ID
telegram_api_id.description: Numeric API ID from https://my.telegram.org/apps — create a personal app, NOT a bot. Required for /ops-inbox telegram.

telegram_api_hash.title: Telegram API Hash
telegram_api_hash.description: API hash from https://my.telegram.org/apps. Required for /ops-inbox telegram.

telegram_phone.title: Telegram Phone Number
telegram_phone.description: Your phone number in E.164 format e.g. '+15551234567'. Used once during first-run --auth. Required for /ops-inbox telegram.

telegram_session.title: Telegram Session String
telegram_session.description: Persisted gram.js StringSession. Generate once via `node telegram-server/index.js --auth` in a terminal after filling the 3 fields above. Required for /ops-inbox telegram.

aws_region.title: AWS Region
aws_region.description: Default AWS region for infra checks e.g. 'us-east-1' (optional)
